description: The base URL of the power pages portal (e.g., https://your-org.powerappsportals.com). Used by flows to construct deep links in notifications.
The Microsoft Teams Group (Team) ID where escalation adaptive cards are posted.
The Microsoft Teams Channel ID within the escalation Team.
Number of business hours before an unassigned item is flagged as stale.
Start of the business day in 24-hour format (HH:mm).
End of the business day in 24-hour format (HH:mm).
Windows time zone ID for business hours calculations (e.g., Eastern Standard Time).
Optional shared mailbox address for notification emails. Leave empty to use the flow owner's mailbox.
The GUID of the model-driven app, used to construct deep links in Teams card actions.
